---
title: "SKILL.qmd"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\error-analysis\SKILL.qmd"
loc: 117
complexity: 1
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 10.00
---

## Intent
The `SKILL.qmd` sector implements modular logic focusing on error-analysis. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via error-analysis. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `error-analysis`
